title: System Configuration
subtitle: Manage global environment variables, security protocols, and system health.

platform.title: Platform Preferences
platform.emergencyDesc: Push high-priority alerts to all active personnel mobile apps.
platform.maintenanceDesc: Temporarily restrict access for scheduled database updates.
platform.autoAuditDesc: Automatically generate weekly safety compliance reports.

security.title: Security Protocol
security.description: Your system is currently running on Encrypted Node V2. All personnel data is hashed using SHA-256 and salted at the hardware level.
